properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Victory is mine, victory is mine, Victory today is mine. I told satan, "Get ye behind," Victory today is mine.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The Holy Ghost is mine, The Holy Ghost is mine, The Holy Ghost today is mine. I told satan, "Get ye behind," The Holy Ghost today is mine.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Joy is mine, Joy is mine, Joy today is mine. I told satan, "Get ye behind," Joy today is mine.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Love is mine, Love is mine, Love today is mine. I told satan, "Get ye behind," Love today is mine.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Peace is mine, peace is mine, Peace today is mine. I told satan, "Get ye behind," Peace today is mine.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: God is mine, God is mine, God today is mine. I told Satan, "Get ye behind," God today is mine.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Healing is mine, Healing is mine, Healing today is mine. I told Satan, "Get ye behind," Healing today is mine.
